name: New Certificate Added to Certificate Store
notes:
This rule detects the addition of new root, CA or AuthRoot certificates to the Windows registry

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: New Root or CA or AuthRoot Certificate to Store
SIGMA Description: Detects the addition of new root, CA or AuthRoot certificates to the Windows registry


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)

when the event matches Registry Key (custom) is any of [\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\Root\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\Root\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\EnterpriseCertificates\Root\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\CA\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\CA\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\EnterpriseCertificates\CA\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\AuthRoot\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\AuthRoot\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\EnterpriseCertificates\AuthRoot\Certificates]
when the event matches Registry Value Data (custom) is any of Binary Data
TD_list: APPLY New Certificate Added to Certificate Store on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)

AND when the event matches Registry Key (custom) is any of [\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\Root\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\Root\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\EnterpriseCertificates\Root\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\CA\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\CA\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\EnterpriseCertificates\CA\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\AuthRoot\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\SystemCertificates\AuthRoot\Certificates or \SOFTWARE\Microsoft\EnterpriseCertificates\AuthRoot\Certificates]
AND when the event matches Registry Value Data (custom) is any of Binary Data
RED_list: Event name: New Certificate Added to Certificate Store
Event description: Detects the addition of new root, CA or AuthRoot certificates to the Windows registry
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
